content:
# Aqueous Kinetics

**Summary**: Chemical reactions occurring between species in the aqueous phase.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] compared basic and full speciation to evaluate the impact of aqueous kinetics.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] Crucial for accurate modeling of acid concentration and its effect on dissolution rates.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] Compared using two different simulation sets in TOUGHREACT.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Full speciation (including aqueous kinetics) resulted in lower free hydrogen ion concentrations compared to basic speciation. ([[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017, p. 105]])
